name: Charon
deathLine: Ah... Ahhh... my child... ending up like this without even reaching revenge...
description: Emerging from a tear in twisted space-time, Charon stares at you while exuding an abyssal murderous intent.

relocate.proximity_hint: The density of the subspace thickens rapidly. The target is hidden very close by.

dialogue: Caron: "So, you have come to tear apart even this silence."

Caron: "I know. I was the first to violate the Reaper's laws,
and He merely reclaimed the child's soul according to the established providence."
Caron: "To me, who was a parent before a guardian, that fairness felt more chilling and cruel than anything else."
first.confirm: Caron: "Are you also satisfied with a life of slavery, repeating mechanical purges under the Reaper's law?"
first.reply_loyal: Caron: "How loyal. But you will soon realize that such loyalty sometimes becomes the most heartless blade."
first.reply_ambitious: Caron: "That look in your eyes... I see the thirst that one who remembers the weight of a crown should rightly feel."

dialogue: Caron: "...But tell me. Are rules more important than a soul?"

Caron: "The Reaper treated my child as 'error data' and erased them.
My centuries of devotion meant nothing to Him."

Caron: "I loathe it. That cold order that permits no grief,
and that dry touch that turned my child into a handful of smoke!"
second.confirm:
Caron: "Executioner, if the Reaper's principles were to destroy what is precious to you,
would you also point your blade at Him?"
second.reply: Caron: "I see. The weight of your existence... I believe I understand it completely now."
second.log_ripple: Caron's energy ripples violently before disappearing.

bad_end:
Caron: "(In a cold, sunken voice) This is as far as you run.
You have given nothing but the answers of a loyal hound to all my questions."
Caron: "No ambition, no rage, no sorrow... A mechanical executioner without even a soul."

Caron: "There is no more conversation to be had, no more offers to be made to one like you.
Perish here along with your hollow loyalty!"

specific_lines.ambitious_rebel:
Caron: "O ambitious one, who seeks to usurp the Reaper and become the new law yourself.
Your vengeance is enough to quench my thirst."
specific_lines.loyal_but_ambitious:
Caron: "O monarch, who possesses ambition but is bound by order.
You shall eventually become the Reaper's most dangerous sword."
specific_lines.obedient_traitor:
Caron: "O executioner, who obeys on the outside but harbors the flames of rebellion within.
I hope that deceptive silence becomes the poison that topples the Reaper."

last_offer:
Caron: "(Kneeling with nobility) This is as far as you run.
I am prepared to take final responsibility for my violation."

Caron: "One last offer. I will offer the shell of my soul to the Reaper,
while my essence becomes your shadow, leaving an 'unofficial flaw' in His perfect system."
final.confirm_offer: Caron: "Will you deceive the Reaper with me and watch for an opportunity to take His head?"
accept: Caron: "A wise choice. Breaking the rules is only hard the first time; the second is easy."

Caron: "But the Reaper is keen. If you do not take a trace of my soul,
He will immediately suspect you and seek to excise you."
Caron: "(Tearing a faintly glowing shard from deep within his chest) ...Ugh, take this."
Caron: "This fragment, at least, is genuine. Present this to the Reaper to make Him believe I have been completely annihilated."
Caron: "I will be hiding in the dimensional rift in the [Safe Zone in front of the Underground Elevator]."

Caron: "Come there if you need to manage your forces.
From this day forth, I shall be your shadow and the most secret crack that will bring down the Reaper."
final.refuse:
Caron: "(Smiling bitterly) So you choose the path of the hound after all.
O flawless executioner... Then I ask you to hold me accountable for my final violation."

battle.manual_start: Caron: "How rude. Drawing your sword before my story is even finished... Truly a butcher sent by the Reaper."
win_script: Caron: "(Reaching out a trembling hand toward you as he falls, but you trample it and place your hand on his chest.)"
Caron: "What... are you planning to tear even the essence of a dying soul? You are... a monster worse than the Reaper...!"
You seize Caron's screaming soul and pull it by force.
With a bizarre grinding sound, Caron's soul shatters and condenses into a pitch-black sphere in your hand.
The extracted essence is molded into a grotesque shape at your command and vanishes into the mist.
The remnants of Caron, having lost their self, will now stay in the dimensional rift near the elevator and wait for you.
You can now imprison or release summons in the subspace through the familiar in the safe zone.
A purified [Refined Soul Shard], having lost its master, falls to the floor.
